column18: Connects to PC or Mac (or other device) using HDMI and acts like a monitor. Outpus a selected section of the screen to a matrix of LED strips or to prefab LED panels at up to 60FPS. Can daisy chain up to 48 controllers to power up to 786,432 pixels. Power must be supplied to strips by external power sources. 5V and 12V both work. Others may as well.
